title: Apple’s New Siri AI Is Now Gemini
summary: Apple revealed a rebuilt Siri AI at WWDC 2026 with personal context awareness, screen awareness, Visual Intelligence, writing tools, and cross-device conversations integrated across iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch, and Vision Pro. The new Siri reportedly uses Google Gemini, but regulatory delays in the EU and a cold investor reaction have raised questions about Apple's independent AI capabilities.
writeup: The video covers Apple's WWDC 2026 reveal of a rebuilt Siri that reportedly runs on Google Gemini, with personal context awareness, screen awareness, Visual Intelligence, writing tools, and cross-device conversations spanning iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple Watch, and Vision Pro. It matters because relying on Gemini, alongside regulatory delays in the EU and a cold investor reaction, raises questions about Apple's independent AI capabilities. Key takeaways: the new Siri integrates multimodal and document understanding features across the device lineup; the underlying model is Google's rather than Apple's own.
